task: Ralph (2026-05-15, R17): /admin on dev.doable.me throws 'Something went wrong — A.map is not a function' for platform admins (admin2). Root-cause it, fix it, prevent recurrence on every doable server (incl. fresh setup-server.sh deploys), commit, deploy on dodev.fid.pw so dev.doable.me reflects immediately. Never bind 0.0.0.0. Never weaken security. Never touch prod.

stories.title: Reproduce on dev + capture stack
acceptanceCriteria: Logged into dev.doable.me as admin2@doable.me (isPlatformAdmin=true) via claude-in-chrome
Visiting https://dev.doable.me/admin renders 'Something went wrong' + 'A.map is not a function' + 'Try again' (Dashboard error.tsx boundary)
Console error captured: 'TypeError: A.map is not a function' originating from chunk 02_qi-vb43azw.js:1:198035 (minified admin page)

Network confirms /admin/features, /admin/frameworks, /admin/users all return 200; mismatch is in response shape — /admin/users returns { data, total, limit, offset } envelope but hook stores the whole object as users state

stories.title: Root-cause without guessing
acceptanceCriteria: Owner: commit 05b622dc 'fix(api): enrich GET /admin/users with plan, AI config, and credit fields (BUG-ADMIN-005)' rewrote /admin/users to return { data, total, limit, offset } in camelCase
Consumer apps/web/src/hooks/use-platform-admin.ts:67 does setUsers(data) — stores entire envelope as users state
apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/admin/page.tsx:241 then computes displayUsers via users.map(...) which throws because users is an object

Secondary mismatch: API returns displayName/isPlatformAdmin/platformRole/createdAt (camelCase) but type AdminUser + every consumer in admin-components.tsx, user-management-panel.tsx, page.tsx reads display_name/is_platform_admin/platform_role/created_at (snake_case)

stories.title: Surgical API fix + defensive hook
acceptanceCriteria: services/api/src/routes/admin-users.ts: GET /admin/users returns a flat array of snake_case rows (matches AdminUser type and all consumer code); enriched fields plan/ai_source/model/daily_credits/monthly_credits/rollover_credits/workspace_id preserved in snake_case

apps/web/src/hooks/use-platform-admin.ts: loadUsers + loadFeatures defensively unwrap an optional { data } envelope and assert Array.isArray before setState — protects against any future envelope-style regressions
TypeScript compiles green for affected files (lsp_diagnostics shows 0 errors on the changed files)
No 0.0.0.0 binds introduced, no other security control weakened

stories.title: Regression coverage so this never recurs
acceptanceCriteria: A test file pins the /admin/users contract — asserts Array.isArray(body) and that each row has snake_case fields (id, email, display_name, is_platform_admin, platform_role, plan)
The test runs with the existing API test runner so future enrichment commits cannot silently flip the response shape
Smoke test or unit test added at apps/web/src/hooks for usePlatformAdmin that confirms users state is always an array after load, even if the API ever ships a wrapped envelope

stories.title: Commit, push, deploy on dodev, claude-in-chrome smoke
acceptanceCriteria: Atomic commit on a fix branch; PR opened against main; squash-merged
dodev.fid.pw: sudo -u doable git pull --ff-only origin main; tsx watch picks up the API change automatically; web rebuild + tmux:0 restart for the apps/web change
claude-in-chrome smoke after deploy: navigating to https://dev.doable.me/admin as admin2 renders the actual admin panel (Feature Flags tab visible, no error boundary)
Console clean of TypeError on /admin first-load
Visual verdict before/after screenshots captured
